sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59756" key="kraugasmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κραυγ-ασμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n59756.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">screaming</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16</biblScope> </bibl>; censured by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">317</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
